description: Download and analyze per-residue pLDDT from AlphaFold structure of A0A804UIX9
code:
import requests
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Download the AlphaFold PDB
url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-A0A804UIX9-F1-model_v6.pdb"
resp = requests.get(url)
pdb_text = resp.text

# Parse B-factor column (contains pLDDT) from CA atoms
residues = []
plddts = []
for line in pdb_text.split('\n'):
    if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
        res_num = int(line[22:26].strip())
        bfactor = float(line[60:66].strip())
        residues.append(res_num)
        plddts.append(bfactor)

residues = np.array(residues)
plddts = np.array(plddts)

print(f"Total residues: {len(residues)}")
print(f"Mean pLDDT: {np.mean(plddts):.1f}")
print(f"Median pLDDT: {np.median(plddts):.1f}")

# Define regions
regions = {
    'N-term disordered (1-44)': (1, 44),
    'PGG domain 1 (50-157)': (50, 157),
    'TM1 (54-73)': (54, 73),
    'TM2 (102-123)': (102, 123),
    'TM3 (135-154)': (135, 154),
    'Linker (158-216)': (158, 216),
    'TM4 (166-189)': (166, 189),
    'PGG domain 2 (217-294)': (217, 294),
    'TM5 (222-239)': (222, 239),
    'TM6 (269-290)': (269, 290),
    'C-terminal (295-375)': (295, 375),
}

print("\n=== Per-region pLDDT ===")
for name, (start, end) in regions.items():
    mask = (residues >= start) & (residues <= end)
    if np.any(mask):
        region_plddt = plddts[mask]
        print(f"  {name}: mean={np.mean(region_plddt):.1f}, min={np.min(region_plddt):.1f}, max={np.max(region_plddt):.1f}")

# Plot
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 5))
ax.plot(residues, plddts, 'b-', linewidth=1)
ax.fill_between(residues, plddts, alpha=0.3)

# Color regions
tm_regions = [(54,73), (102,123), (135,154), (166,189), (222,239), (269,290)]
for i, (s, e) in enumerate(tm_regions):
    ax.axvspan(s, e, alpha=0.2, color='red', label='TM helix' if i==0 else '')

pgg_regions = [(50, 157), (217, 294)]
for i, (s, e) in enumerate(pgg_regions):
    ax.axvspan(s, e, alpha=0.1, color='blue', label='PGG domain' if i==0 else '')

ax.axhline(y=70, color='orange', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='pLDDT=70 (confident)')
ax.axhline(y=90, color='green', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='pLDDT=90 (very high)')
ax.axhline(y=50, color='red', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='pLDDT=50 (low)')

ax.set_xlabel('Residue number', fontsize=12)
ax.set_ylabel('pLDDT score', fontsize=12)
ax.set_title('AlphaFold pLDDT confidence for A0A804UIX9', fontsize=14)
ax.set_ylim(0, 100)
ax.legend(loc='lower right', fontsize=9)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('plddt_profile.png', dpi=150)
plt.show()
print("\npLDDT profile saved.")
